nasb.text: and that He has brought you near, Korah, and all your brothers, sons of Levi, with you? And are you seeking for the priesthood also?

esv.text: and that he has brought you near him, and all your brothers the sons of Levi with you? And would you seek the priesthood also?

cnv.text: 耶和華又使你和你所有的兄弟，就是利未的子孫，一同親近他，這在你們看來是小事嗎？你們還要尋求祭司職分嗎？

ccb.text: 可拉啊，耶和华使你和其他利未人事奉祂，你们还不满足，还要贪求祭司的职分吗？
